case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC VS. MIKE ALONSO et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-01-2014 - CASE SETTLED IN THE HALLWAY. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON FEB-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. 206
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-05-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MIKE ALONSO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
